= March 7, 2025 |org7 = [[Bloomberg News]] |url7 = https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-03-07/wikipedia-editors-struggle-to-moderate-conflict-in-gaza?srnd=homepage-americas |lang7 = |quote7 = [[WP:MORATORIUM]] on move discussions == {{discussion top|result=There was strong support for '''12-month moratorium'''. Given how long it took to close this discussion, that no move discussions have happened in the meantime, and that some folks wanted 6 months, I'm going to arbitrarily backdate the start of the clock, and declare an expiration date of August 3, 2026. -- [[User:Beland|Beland]] ([[User talk:Beland|talk]]) 11:49, 8 December 2025 (UTC)}} Given that there has been three failed [[WP:RM]]s on this article since March, I propose a 6 month moratorium on discussing it.
Pinging editors from the most recent discussion: @[[User:Abo Yemen|Abo Yemen]], @[[User:Alaexis|Alaexis]], @[[User:Bluethricecreamman|Bluethricecreamman]], @[[User:Cdjp1|Cdjp1]], @[[User:Chess|Chess]], @[[User:Chicdat|Chicdat]], @[[User:Closetside|Closetside]], @[[User:CommunityNotesContributor|CommunityNotesContributor]], @[[User:EvansHallBear|EvansHallBear]], @[[User:FortunateSons|FortunateSons]], @[[User:Genabab|Genabab]], @[[User:Gotitbro|Gotitbro]], @[[User:Green Montanan|Green Montanan]], @[[User:Lf8u2|Lf8u2]], @[[User:M.Bitton|M.Bitton]], @[[User:Metallurgist|Metallurgist]], @[[User:ModernDayTrilobite|ModernDayTrilobite]], @[[User:Qhairun|Qhairun]], @[[User:Reenem|Reenem]], @[[User:Samuelshraga|Samuelshraga]], @[[User:Skitash|Skitash]], @[[User:Smallangryplanet|Smallangryplanet]], @[[User:Suriname0|Suriname0]], @[[User:The_Cheesedealer|The_Cheesedealer]], @[[User:Trdta4|Trdta4]]. Apologies if I missed anyone. ''[[User:TarnishedPath|TarnishedPath]]''[[User talk:TarnishedPath|talk]] 01:35, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Support'''. It's about time we put a stop to these time sinks. [[User:M.Bitton|M.Bitton]] ([[User talk:M.Bitton|talk]]) 03:18, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *:@[[User:M.Bitton|M.Bitton]], I've just amended my proposal to clarify a moratorium for 6 months. I imagine you might argue for longer given your previous arguments in such discussions. Are you good with me amending my proposal to clarify it, after you've already !voted? ''[[User:TarnishedPath|TarnishedPath]]''[[User talk:TarnishedPath|talk]] 03:26, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *::Sure, though I wouldn't say no to a 12 month moratorium (if there is support for it). [[User:M.Bitton|M.Bitton]] ([[User talk:M.Bitton|talk]]) 03:32, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Support''' a 12 months moratorium [[Special:Contributions/Abo_Yemen|𐩣𐩫𐩧𐩨]] [[User:Abo Yemen|Abo Yemen]] ([[User talk:Abo Yemen|𓃵]]) 06:08, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Support''' Generally supportive of this per my original reply in the discussion above [leaning towards 6], "And support a 6/12 month moratorium. ... This is an unsubstantiated and unreasonable re-opening of an RM by a now topic-banned editor whose last move request failed after an unilateral move to the raid title (both March 2025). ... attempts to WP:BLUDGEON the community and the process will not be successful." Though this may not formally be required, as our closer's comments say "Second, both of the most recent full RMs were launched a single user, who is now topic-banned from this area; accordingly, I think it's worth testing whether their absence will allow the titling debate to subside on its own." [[User:Gotitbro|Gotitbro]] ([[User talk:Gotitbro|talk]]) 06:42, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *If consensus leads towards a 12 month moratorium, I'd also '''Support''' that. ''[[User:TarnishedPath|TarnishedPath]]''[[User talk:TarnishedPath|talk]] 07:49, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Support''' 6-12 months to avoid further time sink due to three failed RMs in three months. [[User:CommunityNotesContributor|CNC]] ([[User talk:CommunityNotesContributor|talk]]) 08:44, 26 July 2025 (UTC) :'''Support''' I did advocate for a Moratorium on the latest discussion for Nuseirat. So I'm all for it. 12 months. [[User:Genabab|Genabab]] ([[User talk:Genabab|talk]]) 09:03, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Support''' 6–12 months as I am sure we're all thoroughly tired of this page appearing at RM. [[Special:Contributions/Chicdat|🐔]] [[User:Chicdat|Chicdat]]  ''[[User talk:Chicdat|Bawk to me!]]'' 10:23, 26 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Oppose''' a moratorium. Seems unnecessary, the initiator was topic-banned anyway. If a moratorium is supported anyway, I support the shortest possible. Cheers, [[User:Suriname0|Suriname0]] ([[User talk:Suriname0|talk]]) 15:36, 26 July 2025 (UTC) * '''Support 3 months, neutral on 6 months, oppose longer than 6 months'''. tThe exhaustion of editors should be balanced with what the closer of the last RM said: {{tq|this is now the second no-consensus RM in a row on this topic, which suggests that there's not a clear affirmative consensus that needs to be defended}}. I think probably the discussion has been exhausted such that some kind of break is needed, but a long moratorium wouldn't be about preserving consensus, just about protecting a no-consensus status quo where one side was supported more by votes than by sources or policy (per the last close). [[User:Samuelshraga|Samuelshraga]] ([[User talk:Samuelshraga|talk]]) 04:56, 27 July 2025 (UTC) * '''Support 12 month''' per my [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talk:Nuseirat_rescue_and_massacre#c-Smallangryplanet-20250624082900-Chess-20250623225300 reasoning on the previous RM]. [[User:Smallangryplanet|Smallangryplanet]] ([[User talk:Smallangryplanet|talk]]) 13:44, 27 July 2025 (UTC) :'''oppose''' moratorium as mentioned by others and the closer of the RM this issue has not reached consensus. It is reasonable to assume that new information will be made available constantly as the war winds down (hopefully), and if consensus will become possible it should be left open to another RM. :Trdta4 [[User:Trdta4|Trdta4]] ([[User talk:Trdta4|talk]]) 16:32, 27 July 2025 (UTC) :'''Support, 12 months''', doesn't seem like any other incoming RMs regarding this will be good faithed — '''[[User:The_Cheesedealer|🧀Cheesedealer]] ''[[User_talk:The_Cheesedealer|!!!⚟]]''''' 17:50, 27 July 2025 (UTC) :'''Strongly oppose''', no consensus has been reached, and this article continues not to reflect [[WP:POV]]. [[Wikipedia:MORATORIUM|Moratoriums]] should be applied sparingly, as "run counter to the general practice on Wikipedia that any editor may initiate a discussion on any topic related to the operations of the encyclopedia at any time." [[User:אקעגן|אקעגן]] ([[User talk:אקעגן|talk]]) 14:43, 28 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Neither Support nor Oppose''' - I dont like the idea of moratoriums, but this discussion has gone nowhere after three attempts. As I said above, I am increasingly of the mind that the word "massacre" is a politically charged word (see also: terrorist) and should not be used, but thats a discussion for elsewhere I would like to propose eventually. [[User:Metallurgist|Metallurgist]] ([[User talk:Metallurgist|talk]]) 19:20, 30 July 2025 (UTC) *'''Oppose'''. It looks like a way to cement an existing title that is not grounded in any policy - the wikilink in the thread title leads to an essay. [[User:Alaexis|Alaexis]][[User_talk:Alaexis|¿question?]] 21:45, 1 August 2025 (UTC) :'''Support moratorium of 12 months''' - It is highly unlikely there will be any new sourcing to change the repeatedly established consensus in the next 12 months. If there is, it can be brought forward then [[User:Lf8u2|Lf8u2]] ([[User talk:Lf8u2|talk]]) 18:32, 3 August 2025 (UTC) *'''Support moratorium of 12 months''' - For the reasons already mentioned by others. This has been relitigated multiple times, there is no reasonable prospect of any new sourcing arising that can change the outcome of relitigating it yet again, and the page has been targeted for canvassing so it makes it prone to repeat RMs in quick succession as we have seen before. [[User:Raskolnikov.Rev|Raskolnikov.Rev]] ([[User talk:Raskolnikov.Rev|talk]]) 10:07, 8 December 2025 (UTC) {{discussion bottom}} == Arnon Zamora? == In article many times is "Arnon Zmora", but maybe should be "Arnon Zamora" (it's most often in Google search, e.g. [https://www.jpost.com/israel-news/defense-news/article-868737 Hamas terrorist who killed officer Arnon Zamora struck | The Jerusalem Post], but before, wroten direct after action [https://www.timesofisrael.com/officer-who-fought-hamas-on-oct-7-dies-of-wounds-from-hostage-rescue-raid-in-gaza/ Officer dies of wounds from hostage rescue raid in Gaza; entire op renamed in his honor | The Times of Israel] probably with mistake)? I suspect (I don't know his family descent) that like [[wiktionary:Zamora|in Spanish]] (e.g. [[Zamora|city]]), not like [[wiktionary:zmora|in Polish]] (I don't found in my native country [[Mare (folklore)|this name]], only diminutive pseudonym of my friend, but [[Zmora|Israeli surnames]] sometimes - probably from bad transliteration from European languages), because transcription from Hebrew letters is without vowels? Check exactly & fix it, please. KKE [[Special:Contributions/94.172.21.243|94.172.21.243]] ([[User talk:94.172.21.243|talk]]) 03:12, 14 October 2025 (UTC)
